title: draba czuensis
intro: Draba czuensis, also known as Cuzco rockcress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Draba czuensis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially alleviating symptoms of various diseases. The plant is often prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and its herbal preparations are also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
